hero.title: Your next Citroën, configured in conversation.
hero.sub: Speak, see, decide. Rihla walks with you at every step, in your language. A new kind of car store.

models.section_sub: Six cars built for Morocco. Configure them, see them in your world, picture yourself at the wheel.

buyingPath.title_tail: steps, from first hello to keys.
buyingPath.sub: A funnel designed for the Moroccan market. No hidden paperwork, no mystery discounts.
buyingPath.step1_body: Describe what you need in Darija, French or English. She understands and guides you.
buyingPath.step2_body: Colour, trim, options — visualise the result in real time.
buyingPath.step3_body: Monthly, 5-year TCO, 3 financing routes side by side.
buyingPath.step4_body: A refundable deposit secures your configuration with the dealer.
buyingPath.step5_body: The dealer calls you within 2 hours to finalise delivery and the test drive.

bento.sub: Six capabilities built for the Moroccan market. Each one calibrated to simplify your decision, not dazzle.
bento.tile1_title: An advisor who actually gets you
bento.tile1_body: Rihla speaks your language, remembers what you like, and adapts to your session. Like a sales rep who's known you forever.
bento.tile2_body: Describe the car you want — colour, trim, vibe. Your Citroën appears and morphs in real time.
bento.tile3_body: Your exact build, set in your street, your beach, your medina. Ready to share with your family.
bento.tile4_body: Thirty cinematic seconds. Your car, your favourite road, your voice. A keepsake, or a dream to share.
bento.tile5_body: Monthly payment, real 5-year cost, three options side by side. Explained like a friend would. No traps, no surprises.
bento.tile6_title: From chat to road, no friction
bento.tile6_body: Reserve in conversation. Your dealer receives everything they need to know before they even call.

finalCta.sub: Try it, configure it, reserve it. A new way to buy a car, designed around you.

footer.description: Morocco's first agentic car store. From the first word to the first road, in your language.
footer.rights: © 2026 Stellantis Morocco. All brands are the property of their respective owners.

rihla.title: Rihla
rihla.subtitle: Your Citroën journey companion
rihla.placeholder: Type or speak in Darija, French or English...
rihla.greeting: Hi! I'm Rihla. I can help you choose, configure and reserve your Citroën. Where should we start?

dealers.title: Your Citroën, close to home.
dealers.sub: Find your nearest official dealer. Direct WhatsApp contact, test drives by appointment, delivery across Morocco.

financing_page.title: What does it really cost?
financing_page.sub: Monthly payments across several terms, 5-year total cost, side by side. Nothing hidden. Rihla can walk you through it.

reserve.title: Finalise your build
reserve.sub: One last step before your dealer reaches out. A small refundable deposit secures your choice.
